description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical cup with a dark metallic holder that wraps around the lower portion and base, featuring ornate embossed patterns. The upper part of the cup is made of translucent brown glass, allowing some visibility of the contents inside. A prominent, curved metal handle is attached to one side, providing a secure grip. The base is wide and stable, with additional decorative embossing that adds to its visual appeal. The cup's design is reminiscent of traditional Russian tea glass holders, combining both functionality and decorative elements. The overall appearance is elegant and robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A tall, translucent brown glass cup with an ornate dark metal holder and a curved handle, featuring decorative embossing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed metal holder and the translucent brown glass above, with the handle not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metal handle and the detailed embossing on the holder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the metal holder and the vertical attachment of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle visible on the left and the decorative metalwork clearly shown.
